name: StabiliFPS
description: Sodium's best companion. StabiliFPS takes the high average FPS that Sodium/Lithium give you and makes it STABLE — killing the sudden 100 -> 8 -> 100 stutter by adapting render distance, framerate cap and entity culling to the live frame budget. Includes a live HUD (1% lows, frame-time sparkline, GC pauses) and a built-in A/B benchmark harness that exports reproducible reports. Designed to compose with every other perf mod; every feature is independently toggleable.
